_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing and evaluating prompt engineering strategies, including few-shot prompting, chain-of-thought prompting, and structured output generation.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-S-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-T-002 (AI, cosine: 0.337), OP-K-008 (OP, cosine: 0.337).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.4/10 (raw 0.441). Shared vocabulary: [generation]. DCWF-only terms [feedback, provide, rfi] vs WIDAI-only terms [chain, designing, engineering, evaluating, few, output] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.869 (P=0.890, R=0.849). P exceeds R by 0.042 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 17 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: entailment-dominant (78.6%). The model interprets "Provide feedback for RFI generation." as logically implying aspects of "Skill in designing and evaluating prompt engineering strategies, including few-s" — directional semantic containment consistent with 'Intersects with' classification.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.375 < STS 0.441 (gap -0.065). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [feedback, provide, rfi] and [chain, designing, engineering] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.5%. Shared tokens: [generation]. DCWF-only: [feedback, provide, rfi]. WIDAI-only: [chain, designing, engineering, evaluating, few, output].
